Eliminate Fire Alarm Headaches

Fire alarm delays can halt multi-million dollar projects. Here's how FDU keeps you on track:

The Problem

Coordinating separate designer and installer slows projects

The FDU Solution

Single point of accountability from blueprint to final inspection

The Problem

Failed inspections cost days and damage your reputation

The FDU Solution

Deep AHJ relationships ensure first-time approvals

The Problem

Change orders blow your budget

The FDU Solution

Value engineering optimizes without compromising safety

The FDU Design-Build Process

One partner from blueprint to final inspection. Simple, streamlined, on schedule.

01

Consultation & Design

We review your plans, identify requirements, and create value-engineered designs that meet code and budget.

02

Permitting & AHJ Coordination

Our deep relationships with Bay Area authorities having jurisdiction expedite approvals and prevent delays.

03

Installation & Integration

Seamless coordination with your electrical contractor and other trades keeps your project on schedule.

04

Testing & Final Inspection

Thorough pre-testing ensures first-time inspection success, so you can close out on time.

555 City Center, Oakland

Frequently Asked Questions

Typically 2-4 weeks depending on the jurisdiction and project complexity. Our relationships with Bay Area AHJs often expedite this process compared to the industry standard of 4-6 weeks.
